description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a combination of white and brown brick exterior finishes. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a taller, white section with a steep gable roof and a lower, rectangular section clad in brown brick. Large, rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically on the front and side, providing ample natural light. The roof of the main section is sharply pitched, while the brick section has a flat roof, possibly usable as a terrace. The overall appearance is minimalist, with clean lines and a lack of decorative elements. The entryway is understated, integrated into the brick section with a simple door and no visible porch or steps.
description: A modern house with a steep gable roof, white and brown brick exterior, and large asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the steep gable roof and a two-story brown brick section with two large windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large windows, and the contrast between the white and brown brick sections.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the white gable roof and the edge of the brown brick section.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain white wall with no windows or architectural features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door integrated into the brick section, no porch or decorative elements
